data.title: AGROUP: Strong 2025 turnaround with higher profits, new dividend policy, and accelerated development
data.description:
Development and value creation accelerated in 2025, with net income reaching 133 Mkr and revenue up to 377 Mkr. A new dividend policy was set, and major JV projects and building rights activations marked a strategic shift, while financial ratios remained strong.

Original document: Arlandastad Group AB [AGROUP] Interim report — Feb. 18 2026

Disclaimer
This is an AI-generated summary and may contain inaccuracies. Please verify any important information with the original source.

data.title: GRMN: Record revenue, strong segment growth, higher dividend, and new $500M buyback announced
data.description:
Record Q4 and FY2025 revenue and profit, with all segments achieving record sales. Fitness led growth with a 42% Q4 revenue increase, while a 17% dividend hike and a new $500 million share repurchase were announced. FY2026 revenue is guided up 9% to $7.9 billion.

Original document: Garmin Ltd. [GRMN] SEC 8-K Current Report — Feb. 18 2026

Disclaimer
This is an AI-generated summary and may contain inaccuracies. Please verify any important information with the original source.

data.title: OSW: Record 2025 revenue and EBITDA, with 2026 guidance above $1B and strong capital returns
data.description:
Record fiscal 2025 results with $961M in revenue and $123.3M adjusted EBITDA, driven by cruise segment growth and technology investments. Fiscal 2026 guidance projects revenues above $1B, with continued capital returns and operational focus after exiting certain Asian and European operations.

Original document: OneSpaWorld Holdings Limited [OSW] SEC 8-K Current Report — Feb. 18 2026

Disclaimer
This is an AI-generated summary and may contain inaccuracies. Please verify any important information with the original source.

data.title: SSR Mining to redeem $227.495M of 2.50% convertible notes, conversion option through March 19
data.description:
SSR Mining announced a notice of redemption for $227.495 million of its 2.50% Convertible Senior Notes due 2039, with redemption set for March 20, 2026.

Key Highlights:

  • Issued Redemption Notice to redeem outstanding Notes on March 20, 2026, at 100% of principal.
  • Total Redemption Amount includes principal, accrued interest to but excluding the Redemption Date, and a make-whole premium.
  • Holders may convert Notes until 5:00 PM NYC on March 19, 2026; post-notice conversion rate is 56.7931 shares per $1,000.
  • Company will settle conversions with common shares, cash for fractional shares, accrued interest and the Make-Whole Premium.
  • If all converted, ~13 million common shares would be issued; these are already included in fully diluted share count.

Original SEC Filing: SSR MINING INC. [ SSRM ] - 8-K - Feb. 18, 2026

Disclaimer
This is an AI-powered summary. It may contain inaccuracies. Consider verifying important information with the source. Please note this summary is solely based on documents filed with the SEC.

data.title: Global Payments appoints Vivek Sankaran to board and Jennifer Bozeman Whyte as Chief Accounting Officer
data.description:
Global Payments appointed Vivek Sankaran to its Board and Audit and Compensation Committees effective Feb 19, 2026, and named Jennifer Bozeman Whyte Chief Accounting Officer and principal accounting officer effective Mar 1, 2026.

IndividualVivek SankaranJennifer Bozeman Whyte
RoleDirector; member of Audit Committee and Compensation CommitteeChief Accounting Officer and principal accounting officer
Type of ChangeAppointedAppointed
Effective DateFeb 19, 2026Mar 1, 2026
ReasonNot disclosedNot disclosed
Replacement InfoNot disclosedNot disclosed
Background DetailsFormer CEO of Albertsons Companies; prior decade at PepsiCo (led Frito-Lay North America); former McKinsey partner; MBA (Michigan); master’s (Georgia Tech); BE (IIT Chennai)With the Company since 2007; most recently Executive VP, Finance Transformation; prior roles include EVP, Business Accounting; SVP, Accounting, Merchant Solutions; VP, Worldwide Controller; licensed CPA (Georgia)
Board/Committee Role ChangesAppointed to Audit Committee and Compensation CommitteeNot disclosed

Original SEC Filing: GLOBAL PAYMENTS INC [ GPN ] - 8-K - Feb. 18, 2026

data.description:
Delivered strong Q4 and full-year 2025 results with revenue, income, and cash flow all up YoY, driven by robust dealer marketplace growth and digital platform adoption. 2026 guidance projects continued earnings and EBITDA growth, with positive industry trends expected.

data.title: DAN: Profitability and cash flow surged in 2025, with expanded capital returns and strong 2026 guidance
data.description:
2025 saw higher profitability and cash flow despite lower sales, driven by cost savings, operational efficiencies, and the Off-Highway business sale. Debt was reduced by nearly $2 billion, and capital return programs were expanded, with strong 2026 and 2030 financial targets reaffirmed.

Original document: Dana Incorporated [DAN] SEC 8-K Current Report — Feb. 18 2026

data.title: Global Payments Q4 profit beats; announces $2.5-billion share repurchase authorization
data.description:
Overview

  • Payment technology firm's Q4 adjusted EPS beat analyst expectations

  • Q4 adjusted revenue met analyst expectations

  • Company announced $2.5 bln share repurchase authorization and $550 mln accelerated plan

Outlook

  • Global Payments expects 2026 adjusted EPS of $13.80 to $14.00, growth of 13% to 15%

  • Company forecasts 2026 adjusted net revenue growth of 5% excluding dispositions

  • Global Payments anticipates 2026 adjusted operating margin expansion of 150 basis points

Result Drivers

  • WORLDPLAY ACQUISITION - Acquisition of Worldpay and divestiture of Issuer Solutions repositioned company as leading merchant solutions provider

  • GENIUS PLATFORM - Launch of Genius platform in Q2 2025 showed strong commercial traction, according to CEO Cameron Bready

  • CASH FLOW FOCUS - Strategic actions in 2025 enhanced cash flow generation, with plans to return $7.5 bln to shareholders by 2027

Key Details

Metric

Beat/Miss

Actual

Consensus Estimate

Q4 Revenue

$1.90 bln

Q4 Adjusted Revenue

Meet

$3.16 (25 Analysts)

Q4 EPS

$0.92

Q4 Adjusted Operating Margin

44.70%

Analyst Coverage

  • The current average analyst rating on the shares is "hold" and the breakdown of recommendations is 12 "strong buy" or "buy", 19 "hold" and 2 "sell" or "strong sell"

  • The average consensus recommendation for the business support services peer group is "buy."

  • Wall Street's median 12-month price target for Global Payments Inc is $95.00, about 36.2% above its February 17 closing price of $69.77

  • The stock recently traded at 5 times the next 12-month earnings vs. a P/E of 6 three months ago

Press Release:

For questions concerning the data in this report, contact Estimates.Support@lseg.com. For any other questions or feedback, contact reuters.support@thomsonreuters.com.

data.title: REG - Great Western Mining - Total Voting Rights
data.description:
RNS Number : 5392T Great Western Mining Corp. plc 18 February 2026  

Great Western Mining Corporation PLC / AIM: GWMO / Euronext Growth: 8GW

18 February 2026

GREAT WESTERN MINING CORPORATION PLC

("Great Western", "GWM" or the "Company")

Total Voting Rights

In conformity with Regulation 20 of the Transparency (Directive 2004/109/EC) Regulations 2007 and following the recent Share Capital Reorganisation, Great Western announces that as at 18 February 2026 the total number of Ordinary Shares of €0.0001 each in issue (with voting rights) is 376,117,845.  The Company does not hold any ordinary shares in treasury.

This figure may be used by shareholders as the denominator for the calculations by which they will determine if they are required to notify their interest in, or a change to their interest in Great Western under the Transparency (Directive 2004/109/EC) Regulations 2007 and the Transparency Rules.

ENDS

For further information visit www.greatwesternmining.com or contact:

Great Western Mining Corporation PLC 

Brian Hall, Chairman 

c/o St Brides   

Max Williams, Finance Director 

+44 20 7236 1177 

Davy (NOMAD, Euronext Growth Listing Sponsor & Joint Broker)

data.title: The Public Offering Period of UAB S3 Business Bonds Has Been Shortened
data.description:
Nasdaq TallinnAnnouncement from the exchange

The Public Offering Period of UAB S3 Business Bonds Has Been Shortened

The issuer, UAB S3 Business, has announced the early closure of the public

offering period for its bonds. This decision has been made in response to

sufficient investor demand.

The revised offering period will now end on February 18, 2026 at 15:30. As of

the time of this announcement, Nasdaq Exchange Members shall not accept any new

subscription orders from investors. The Members may only enter into the

Exchange Trading System previously received buy orders that have not yet been

entered. Any orders submitted after 15:30 will not be processed and will not be

eligible for bond allocation.

For more information, please read the issuer's announcement:

https://view.news.eu.nasdaq.com/view?id=1420996&lang=en

Nasdaq Baltic

Transaction Services

+370 525 31462 (Vilnius)

+371 672 12431 (Riga)

+372 640 8800 (Tallinn)

https://nasdaqbaltic.com/

Nasdaq Baltic is a common name for exchanges, regulated markets, alternative

markets First North operated by Nasdaq companies in the Baltic states, i.e.

Nasdaq Tallinn AS, Nasdaq Riga AS and AB Nasdaq Vilnius.https://view.news.eu.nasdaq.com/view?id=b183dde013b6493c556f7b87602c1939d&lang=en&src=omxlink

data.title: Microsoft Plans $50 Billion Push to Bring AI to the Global South
data.description:
Microsoft Corporation (MSFT, Financials) says it plans to invest $50 billion by the end of the decade to help expand artificial intelligence access across countries in the Global South.

At the India AI Impact Summit, Microsoft said the next wave of AI growth will not be restricted to the U.S., Europe, or China. Instead, the corporation expects developing markets to shape AI application in business, education, and public services.

The investment will boost data center capacity, cloud infrastructure, and digital skills initiatives. That means more local processing power, better AI tools, and training to help people and companies accept the technology.

Microsoft is increasing capital investment to meet AI-driven cloud platform demand. This commitment shows its long-term interest in areas constructing digital infrastructure.

The proposal raises worries for investors about how rapidly investments will boost revenue. It also shows Microsoft's efforts to gain early market share in AI-adopting markets over the coming decade.

data.title: CNK: 2025 revenue rose 2.1% to $3.1B, net income was $138.2M, and Adjusted EBITDA reached $577.9M
data.description:
Revenue grew 2.1% to $3.1 billion in 2025, with net income of $138.2 million and Adjusted EBITDA of $577.9 million. The company invested heavily in guest experience, repurchased $275.1 million in stock, and increased its annual dividend, while managing risks from debt, competition, and evolving industry dynamics.

Original document: Cinemark Holdings, Inc. [CNK] SEC 10-K Annual Report — Feb. 18 2026
